title: PATIKIL 9.5x6.9 Plastic Tray, 2 Pack Rectangular Plates Small Food Tray Wheat Plates Dishes Reusable Dessert Plate Trays with Cloth for Cake Fruits Salad Cupcake Steak Serving White
features: Material: PP; Size: 24x17.5 cm/ 9.5x6.9 inch(L*W);; Inner Height: 1.5 cm/0.59 inch;; Packing List: 2 Pack rectangular plastic dinner plate with wiping cloth

Advantage: The plastic dinner plates are made of PP, which is lightweight and has smooth edges that touch well. The surface has a frosted texture, is not easy to fade or get dirty, and can be reused for a long time. These appetizer plates are reliable and practical, and the depth is relatively deep to prevent food from spilling. It can hold a variety of foods, such as cupcakes, fruits, bread, snacks, etc., which is a good choice for tableware use.
Instruction: These plates are easy to clean. After use, just wash them with a cleaning tool, or wash them in a dishwasher. After washing, stack them and put them in the cupboard for future use.

Application: This plastic dinner plate is lightweight and durable and can be used to place food and as a tray. It is suitable for indoor and outdoor use, family gatherings, dinners, lunches, outdoor camping, picnics and travel, etc.
NOTE: The product is not suitable for microwave oven.
